Petition For Sale Or Other Equitable Division Of Undivided Interest In Property [Prob. C. 11950]
Off Calendar Jan-25-2017 Continued To Feb-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Nora Guerrero For Determination Of Entitlement
Off Calendar Dec-07-2016 Off Calendar

Petition Of Nora Guerrero For Determination Of Entitlement
Off Calendar Sep-28-2016 Continued To Dec-07-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Nora Guerrero For Determination Of Entitlement
Off Calendar Aug-17-2016 Continued To Sep-28-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Leandro Duran for and with petitioner Nora Guerrero; Alma Borondy; Tom Fuentes; Jesus Guerrero, in pro per (By CourtCall)

The Court inquired whether Mr. Guerrero wished to object to the petition. He replied that he did object. The Court informed him that he needed to put his objection in writing and file it with the Court. He granted Mr. Guerrero until September 14, 2016 to file his objection. The matter was continued to September 28, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Letters Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-24-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Mayo for (proposed administrator) Lorna Stephanie Sotomayor. Leandro Duran for Nora Guerrero.

The Court stated that the only issue is to whether bond is to be at full value or if there will be limited authority. Ms. Mayo stated that she did not Marsden calculation, that the parents are to receive less than $350,000.00 and that the petition for final distribution could pay the creditors along with distribution. Mr. Duran stated that they have no objection to the calculation or the plan and that they have submitted points and authorities. The Court asked if there was anything else on the underlying petition. Mr. Duran stated that it is important to get this matter resolved promptly, that the minimal discovery was derailed, that they want to take the deposition of the petition in 30 days and that if there is no additional information they wll remove the objection. Ms. Mayo stated that her client is a high school teacher, that she is struggling and does not have the funds to do a full bond but that she can do a bond for $350,000.00. The Court stated that it will take petition for letters of administration under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos & Deputy Neves. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Letters Of Administration
Off Calendar Feb-22-2016 Continued To Mar-14-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-28-2015 Continued To Jan-20-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Mayo for (petitioner) Stephanie Sotomayor. Leandro Duran for (objector) Nora Guerrero.

The Court confirmed that the parties have agreed to mediate. Ms. Mayo stated that the father also agrees to mediate, that they have contacted Ms. Pantazis and are hoping to mediate in late November or December. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than December 22, 2015. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by December 31, 2015. The petition for spousal property was continued to and the Parties are to return on January 20, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-14-2015 Continued To Oct-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-23-2015 Continued To Oct-14-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
